name: Hot Red Dragon Archfiend
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>琰</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> レッド・デーモン
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
Once per turn, during your Main Phase 1: You can destroy all other face-up Attack Position monsters on the field. Other monsters cannot attack the turn you activate this effect.

eff:

mst: Destroys face-up Attack Position Monster Cards
summoning: Does not require specific Synchro Materials
